name: Curry Honey Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place skinned chicken in a 9x13 inch pan.
2. Blend the remaining ingredients and heat until the butter melts and honey is incorporated.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken; cover.
4. Refrigerate overnight.
5. Cover the pan with foil.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. Remove the foil and bake an additional 15 minutes.
8. Serve over hot rice, spooning any extra sauce on top.
